title: Frequently Asked Questions
subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Leave Planner.

items.a: Leave Planner is a centralized web-based platform that automates employee leave requesting, tracking, approval workflows, and reporting — replacing manual spreadsheets and emails.
We support Sick Leave, Vacation, Personal, Maternity/Paternity, Unpaid Leave, Work From Home, Business Trips, and configurable public holidays (including UAE holidays).

items.q: How many employees can the system handle?
items.a: Leave Planner is built for organizations of 300 to 20,000+ employees, with department-level and team-level views available in grid format.

items.q: Does it integrate with my calendar?
items.a: Yes — approved leaves automatically sync with Outlook, Google Calendar, Slack, and other calendar systems via our integration API.

items.q: How does the approval workflow work?
items.a: Employees submit requests, managers receive notifications and can approve or reject in under 3 clicks while viewing team availability and conflict alerts.
Absolutely. Leave Planner is fully responsive and works seamlessly on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
We implement SSO integration, data encryption at rest, and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to ensure employees only see their own private data.
Yes — department administrators and HR can export reports in CSV and PDF formats at any time.
